TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男子名 Ahoq lalu likuy qu Ahoq qani. sbiru biru Theluw nqu hngyang ke Tayal gbang squ hngya'an ke Theluw. hngyang ke Theluw qani ga, mqoyat na qnxan muci imi nya. yasa tlalu nqu bnkis. aki ta mblaq mrkyas ru mqoyat mqyanux. lalu nya qalang Tuba hiya ga, minkahul squ sraral mga, trang muwah bnayang hmkangi qu giqas na kki'an ngasal bnkis mga, ktan nha cingay balay qu tuba cyux maki rhzyal qani, nanu yasa smlalu nha qalang Tuba ru kwara zyaw na tmuba qulih ru qnxan qalang uzi ga. cbaqan bnkis kwara kinbahan nha, m'iyuw qutux giqas na kawas lga, rasun na kwara llaqi qalang musa tmuba qulih te syaw gong qalang nanak. qozyat balay qu lalu na Ahoq hiya.(Ahoq是很有福氣的名字) baq balay qmalup i Ahoq.(Ahoq很會打獵)
S.PHON: == == ****** aħoq lalu likuj qu aħoq qani. s~ɕβiru βiru tħeluw nqu ħŋjaŋ ke tajal ɣβaŋ s~ɕqu ħŋjaʔan ke tħeluw. ħŋjaŋ ke tħeluw qani ɣa, mqojat na qnxan muʦ~ʨi imi nja. jas~ɕa tlalu nqu βnkis~ɕ. aki ta mβlaq mrkjas~ɕ ru mqojat mqjanux. lalu nja qalaŋ tuβa ħija ɣa, minkaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕraral mɣa, traŋ muwaħ βnajaŋ ħmkaŋi qu ɣiqas~ɕ na kkiʔan ŋas~ɕal βnkis~ɕ mɣa, ktan nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu tuβa ʦ~ʨjux maki rħzjal qani, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕmlalu nħa qalaŋ tuβa ru kwara zjaw na tmuβa quliħ ru qnxan qalaŋ uzi ɣa. ʦ~ʨβaqan βnkis~ɕ kwara kinβaħan nħa, mʔijuw qutux ɣiqas~ɕ na kawas~ɕ lɣa, ras~ɕun na kwara llaqi qalaŋ mus~ɕa tmuβa quliħ te s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ qalaŋ nanak. qozjat βalaj qu lalu na aħoq ħija.(aħoq********) βaq βalaj qmalup i aħoq.(aħoq****)
S.FORM: == == 泰雅族男子名 Ahoq lalu likuy qu Ahoq qani. sbiru biru Theluw nqu hngyang ke Tayal gbang squ hngya'an ke Theluw. hngyang ke Theluw qani ga, mqoyat na qnxan muci imi nya. yasa tlalu nqu bnkis. aki ta mblaq mrkyas ru mqoyat mqyanux. lalu nya qalang Tuba hiya ga, minkahul squ sraral mga, trang muwah bnayang hmkangi qu giqas na kki'an ngasal bnkis mga, ktan nha cingay balay qu tuba cyux maki rhzyal qani, nanu yasa smlalu nha qalang Tuba ru kwara zyaw na tmuba qulih ru qnxan qalang uzi ga. cbaqan bnkis kwara kinbahan nha, m'iyuw qutux giqas na kawas lga, rasun na kwara llaqi qalang musa tmuba qulih te syaw gong qalang nanak. qozyat balay qu lalu na Ahoq hiya.(Ahoq是很有福氣的名字) baq balay qmalup i Ahoq.(Ahoq很會打獵)
S.PHON: == == ****** aħoq lalu likuj qu aħoq qani. s~ɕβiru βiru tħeluw nqu ħŋjaŋ ke tajal ɣβaŋ s~ɕqu ħŋjaʔan ke tħeluw. ħŋjaŋ ke tħeluw qani ɣa, mqojat na qnxan muʦ~ʨi imi nja. jas~ɕa tlalu nqu βnkis~ɕ. aki ta mβlaq mrkjas~ɕ ru mqojat mqjanux. lalu nja qalaŋ tuβa ħija ɣa, minkaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕraral mɣa, traŋ muwaħ βnajaŋ ħmkaŋi qu ɣiqas~ɕ na kkiʔan ŋas~ɕal βnkis~ɕ mɣa, ktan nħa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu tuβa ʦ~ʨjux maki rħzjal qani, nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕmlalu nħa qalaŋ tuβa ru kwara zjaw na tmuβa quliħ ru qnxan qalaŋ uzi ɣa. ʦ~ʨβaqan βnkis~ɕ kwara kinβaħan nħa, mʔijuw qutux ɣiqas~ɕ na kawas~ɕ lɣa, ras~ɕun na kwara llaqi qalaŋ mus~ɕa tmuβa quliħ te s~ɕjaw ɣoŋ qalaŋ nanak. qozjat βalaj qu lalu na aħoq ħija.(aħoq********) βaq βalaj qmalup i aħoq.(aħoq****)
